visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene is set in a dimly lit indoor entertainment room. Four individuals are seated on a dark leather sofa, mostly looking down at their smartphones. A girl in the foreground has a neutral, slightly bored expression while tapping her screen. The background features vertical neon light strips in red and blue. (2) The visual transitions to a girl standing in a performance area of the room. She wears a grey unbuttoned shirt over a black top and a black mini-skirt. She holds a microphone and performs rhythmic side-steps while looking toward the camera with a slight smile. (3) A different girl with long brown hair is seen dancing and singing energetically. She performs hand gestures and hip movements in front of a large digital display screen. A woman in a black hoodie sits nearby, watching and smiling. The room is filled with blue ambient light. (4) A young boy in an 'OCEAN DREAMER' sweatshirt joins a girl to perform a synchronized dance. They are facing a screen showing vibrant, colorful fruit animations. The boy is jumping while the girl performs exaggerated arm movements. (5) Two young boys, one with glasses, are seated on the sofa holding microphones. They are singing with high concentration, their mouths close to the mic grilles. Their facial expressions are serious and focused. (6) A wide shot shows the group on the sofa, laughing and interacting closely. Some are hugging or leaning on each other, showing high arousal and happiness. (7) A close-up of the girl from phase 2 as she sings a high-energy song. She moves closer to the lens, pointing her finger and making direct eye contact with the camera. (8) The video concludes with a group photo composition where all members, including adults and children, pose together with peace signs and heart gestures in front of the table covered in snacks and drinks.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 我以為的唱歌局 (來聽歌、玩手機). (2) [Variety]: one step [Variety]: two step [Variety]: three step [Variety]: four. (3) [Variety]: 仲那. visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 13 individuals are clearly visible in the final group shot, including 2 main female performers and 3 children.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One girl wears a grey shirt over a black crop top and black skirt; another wears a dark sweater and jeans.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical KTV/karaoke room with a large projector screen, neon light strips on walls, leather sofas, and a table filled with drinks, snacks, and tissue boxes.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a low-arousal environment. Muffled background music is heard along with distant chatter. The noise floor is stable room tone. (2) A sudden jump in volume as a female voice starts singing an upbeat dance track with English numbers 'one step, two step...'. The BPM is approximately 120 with a sharp electronic kick drum. (3) The track shifts to a high-energy pop song with heavy synth pads and a driving beat. The female vocal is projected and energetic, showing high arousal. (4) A transition occurs to a more rhythmic, playful song featuring child-like vocals mixed with female singing. The spectral brightness increases with high-frequency percussion. (5) Child voices become dominant, singing a pop ballad with clear articulation and stable pitch. The background music lowers in intensity to allow the vocals to lead. (6) A burst of collective cheering and laughter from the group masks the background track for a few seconds. The spectral flux is high during this peak of social interaction. (7) The final segment features a rock-pop track with audible electric guitar textures and a powerful female vocal performance before ending with a clean cut.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Progressive Energy -> Peak Interaction -> Climax
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a fun and vibrant karaoke gathering, contrasting the 'expectation' of being on phones with the 'reality' of energetic singing and dancing with friends and family.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video features a KTV brand logo and phone number on screen, but it appears as a natural part of the location rather than a paid promotion.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-arousal editing style typical of social media vlogs to emphasize a sense of belonging and joy within a social group.
